local_spectral_fact: The chi-square/local coefficient is strictly below the target 2/w, but this alone is not a proof of global KL-SDPI.
name: Talagrand Act-SDPI Reduction Theorem
next_proof_options: Certified SDPI/SOS upper bound for the shell incidence channel.
Full level-reduction theorem from arbitrary nonnegative vectors to Act profile certificates.
remaining_open_lemma: Global KL-SDPI for the Golay shell incidence channel: D(q||u_B) >= (w/2)D(p_q||u_24) for w=12,16.
statement: The height-coherent sector-33 family Lambda_hc is in ker(Act), so it does not change the Act-dependent shell functional.
The remaining shell-domination problem is exactly the entropy contraction / SDPI inequality for the Act-visible Golay shell incidence channel.
The finite hidden-sector obstruction is no longer an independent theorem debt.
